Photo by Amiyah Walker on May 05, 2026. May be a meme of screen and text that says 'Also meant to text you but was thinking of you when first got to Mexico because of how confident felt in my outfits never would' ve been able to wear what wore and felt really GOOD in it it's paying off already you're the best!! she came to me shecametometofegoihers to feel good in her skin for her wedding and that's exactl what we're gonna do. This just the beginning.'.
Photo by Amiyah Walker on May 05, 2026. May be a meme of text that says 'I'm comfortably wearing size 4 shorts haven't been able to wear these in awhile lol hard work hardworkpaysoff. pays off.'.

Photo by Amiyah Walker on May 05, 2026. May be a Twitter screenshot of screen and text that says 'Amiyah, you were AMAZING!!! loved the vibe of your class. The best mat class So challenging, but feel soooo good. can't wait for more classes!! it doesn't always have to be a on session thestrength& strengt the & confidence you feel after a classis is hands down the best'.

Photo by Amiyah Walker on May 05, 2026. May be a Twitter screenshot of text that says 'feel so GOOD!!! That was so hard but have had such an endorphin boost since class. was literally just telling Sean that am just now starting to come down. You were so awesome! It was a great class, Amiyah!!! was thinking should have gotten a bigger package cause can't wait to do it again. Congratulations to you, and the rest of ECE this is everything.'.

Photo by Amiyah Walker on May 05, 2026. May be a Twitter screenshot of text that says 'amiyah did her big oig one w w this. hardest standing eg series think we've done and didn't even use equipment, the heel raises and arms were more than enough lol. also day, ended with abs using the ball and that was my final straw. love this class and feeling strong! !! killer arm core on the ball coreontheballismyfave, is my fave, iykyk'.

Photo by Amiyah Walker on May 05, 2026. May be a Twitter screenshot of text that says 'this leg series on the ball was so wanted to die the entire time and that's amazing. did have to take several breaks so my next goal will be to do an entire leg series without popping up at all (ik it's ambitious) breaks don't mean you' re weak, physically, your nervous system needs a moment to rer between efforts. Taking that moment can improve motor control, strength output, and coordination when you return'.
